headline: MSCI’s New AI-Focused CTO and Silicon Valley Hub Could Be A Game Changer For MSCI (MSCI)
summary: In early June 2026, MSCI Inc. appointed former Intuit technology leader Kashi Kakarla as Chief Technology Officer and Head of Product Engineering, and confirmed plans to open a new Silicon Valley office to advance its AI and technology agenda. This move signals MSCI’s intent to embed AI more deeply into its indices, analytics and private markets offerings, potentially reshaping how investment professionals access and use its data and tools. We’ll now examine how Kakarla’s AI-focused remit...
